summary: Complete testing of Protoon v1.1.0 website - all backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. Homepage loads with PROTOON hero section, 6 feature cards with updated descriptions, 3 tool cards (Protoon v1.1.0, Fleasion vLatest, USSI Script vLatest), download modal with extraction options, and 4-step How It Works section all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with PROTOON hero section visible
Features section shows 6 feature cards with updated descriptions (Asset Extraction, Full Map Saving, Organized Downloads, CDN Downloading, No Executor Needed, Debug Mode)
Download Tools section shows 3 tool cards: Protoon v1.1.0, Fleasion vLatest, USSI Script vLatest
Clicking Protoon download button opens modal with extraction options list (8 options found)
How It Works section shows 4 steps (Install, Join Game, Choose Options, Get Assets)
/api/tools endpoint returns correct tool data with Protoon v1.1.0
/api/download/protoon endpoint returns download info with extraction_options field
Demo functionality (Load Demo Data and Export) working correctly
All download buttons are clickable and properly integrated
success_percentage: backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), frontend: 100% (15+ UI tests passed)
